title: genista triacanthos subsp. juniperina
intro: Genista triacanthos subsp. juniperina, also known as the purple pea or Juniper genista, is a subspecies of the common broom, Genista triacanthos. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Genista triacanthos subsp. juniperina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Genista triacanthos subsp. juniperina can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
